title: Buttery Brazilian Tomato Stir-fry
description: A romantic and buttery dish featuring a low-sodium tomato puree, perfect for adding to your repertoire of simple yet flavorful meals.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Deglaze the pan with tomato puree. Stir occasionally for 2 minutes.
Gradually add bell pepper slices and onion rings. Cook, stirring frequently, until vegetables start to soften, about 4-5 minutes.
Add soy sauce, sugar, salt, and white pepper. Stir until well combined and the mixture thickens slightly, about 1 minute more.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Serve hot with a sprinkle of chopped fresh parsley on top.
